<internal_defines>
CTR_BE_SIMD32 -> 20260323
</internal_defines>

<module_info>
name -> "CTR-BE SIMD"
brief -> "SIMD-accelerated CTR-BE counter management and XOR"
</module_info>

<requires>
cpuid
simd_4x32
</requires>

<isa>
x86_32:ssse3
x86_64:ssse3
x32:ssse3
arm32:neon
arm64:neon

# disabled until tested
#ppc64:altivec
#loongarch64:lsx
#wasm:simd128
</isa>
